CreditStack.description: AI financial command center for credit-card rewards optimization. Tracks a user's wallet, rewards, credits, and card strategy with a conversational assistant and ROI dashboard.
CreditStack.longDescription: CreditStack is a full-stack fintech product that helps users decide which card to use, track realized and potential value, manage credits and annual fees, and reason through rewards strategy with an AI assistant. The project combines a dashboard, wallet persistence, valuation logic, statement analysis, and AI function-calling to turn messy card benefits into an actionable command center.

Dice-Dine.description: AI dining concierge that turns natural-language cravings, constraints, and location intent into structured restaurant recommendations on an interactive map.
Dice-Dine.longDescription: Dice-Dine is a consumer AI product for restaurant discovery. Users describe what they want in plain language, and the app returns curated dining options with reasons, ratings context, addresses, and map-based visual discovery. It demonstrates conversational UX, structured AI output, authentication, and geospatial product design.

CryptoX.description: Quantitative analysis tool for cryptocurrency markets, providing real-time metrics and trend forecasting.

GoldDigger.description: Advanced data mining and financial analysis tool for identifying market opportunities.

Wooji-Web.description: Web interface for Wooji Capital's asset management system.

EquityFactorModel.description: Sophisticated financial modeling system for equity factor analysis.

WoojiDatabase.description: Core database infrastructure for Wooji Capital.

GameAegis.description: Data collection agent for online game analytics, part of the Project Aegis suite.

AegisTensor.description: Deep learning modeling package for the Aegis analytics suite.

Aegis-Loki.description: Regional analytics module for Project Aegis.

Aegis-Metro.description: Metropolitan data analysis module for Project Aegis.

Aegis-Sovereign.description: Sovereign state analytics module for Project Aegis.

VIT-PLA.description: Visual Interactive Tool for Process Log Analysis.

sequence_gan.description: Generative Adversarial Networks for sequence generation.

keras-attention-mechanism.description: Implementation of attention mechanisms for Keras models.

ThinkingLab.description: Visual ML workbench for designing, validating, simulating, and exporting trainable model workflows.
ThinkingLab.longDescription: ThinkingLab is a visual machine-learning workbench that turns model architecture design into an interactive graph. Users drag data, preprocessing, model, activation, and loss blocks onto a canvas; connect them into workflows; inspect tensor shapes, dtypes, parameters, FLOPs, and validation errors; visualize forward and backward flow; then export runnable PyTorch code and stream local training logs through an Express/SSE backend.
